rationale: Educ. Code §21.254 governs assignment of hearing examiners in teacher contract disputes. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The commissioner shall assign the hearing examiner for a particular case by selecting the next person named on the list who resides within reasonable proximity to the district as determined by the commissioner.
_note: No conflict: the rule concerns education hearing examiner assignment and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
